hero.headline: The pulse of your community, amplified by AI
hero.sub: RapidPulse connects NGOs and volunteers through AI-powered need detection, smart matching, and real-time community intelligence.

how_it_works.title: How RapidPulse works
how_it_works.sub: From paper survey to matched volunteer in minutes
how_it_works.step1_desc: NGO workers photograph paper surveys. Gemini Vision reads Hindi or English handwriting and extracts structured need data automatically.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Each need is assigned a severity score (1–5) strictly based on immediate life risk vs. long-term development needs.
how_it_works.step3_desc: RapidPulse matches volunteers using skills, location radius, and Gemini reasoning — showing NGOs exactly why each volunteer was recommended.

for_ngos.title: See every community need, clearly
for_ngos.bullet1: Upload paper surveys with one photo
for_ngos.bullet2: AI extracts and scores every need automatically
for_ngos.bullet3: Live heatmap of needs by urgency and category
for_ngos.bullet4: Smart volunteer matching with AI reasoning

for_volunteers.title: Turn your skills into real impact
for_volunteers.bullet1: Build a skill profile in minutes
for_volunteers.bullet2: See tasks matched to you by location and skill
for_volunteers.bullet3: Earn XP, badges, and streaks every week
for_volunteers.bullet4: Download a verified certificate of contribution
for_volunteers.bullet5: Appear on your area's volunteer leaderboard

cta.title: Ready to make a difference?
cta.sub: Join RapidPulse today — whether you run an NGO or want to volunteer.

cert.title: Certificate of Contribution
cert.subtitle: In recognition of dedicated community service
